subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Verily, thou art firm in faith, assured and upright, turning thy face toward this divine grace and acceptance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان حقا که مومنی و موقن و مستقیمی و مقبل این توجه و اقبال
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
